title: Fold Armory into Composition: rename, global cross-faculty search, fitting-count fix, per-faculty selected/available counts

visual.note: breadcrumb renamed Composition; strip shows distinct 'faculties 8/8' and 'fittings 16' (the old bug labelled the stationed-faculty count as 'fittings'); each faculty tile shows 'N selected / M available'; search box spans every Faculty and returns cross-faculty add/remove cards; ArmoryPanel deleted, /armory redirects.

dataMigration.note: the split left existing compositions grouping moved fittings under sessions. Migrated compositions/default + compositions/dogfood-orch: codex/gemini -> runtimes, screen-share/browser -> surfaces. Counts now reconcile (Sessions 2/2, Runtimes 2/2, Surfaces 2/3).

preExistingReds.note: full vitest shows 3 reds, NONE from this slice (all proven byte-identical to main via git diff): tests/gemini-runtime.test.ts asserts the removed --skip-trust flag (adapter moved to --approval-mode yolo); tests/orchestrator-integration.test.ts needs a live gateway; tests/spawn-tracked.test.ts is flaky under full-suite concurrency (passes in isolation).
